title: 跨 Org 設備調撥規劃 · Cross-Org Reallocation Planner
subtitle: Partner/MSP 視角 · 識別跨 org 重新配置機會（不執行 mutation，僅規劃）
compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const flat = data => (data.topology?.orgs || []).flatMap(o => (o.devices || []).map(d => ({...d, org_name: o.org_name, _accessible: o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok'}))); const isExpired = d => d.license_status === 'expired'; const isActive = d => d.license_status === 'active'; cf.realloc_summary = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExpired); const orgsWithExp = [...new Set(exp.map(d => d.org_name))]; const orgsWithActive = [...new Set(all.filter(isActive).map(d => d.org_name))]; return `${all.length} 台設備、${exp.length} 個 license 過期（集中在 ${orgsWithExp.join(', ')}）。${orgsWithActive.length} 個 org 仍有 active license 可參考續約模式。建議：先驗證過期設備是否仍在使用，再決定 (a) 續約留原 org、(b) 跨 org 調撥、(c) 報廢。`; }; cf.fleet_total = (data) => flat(data).length; cf.active_license_count = (data) => flat(data).filter(isActive).length; cf.active_license_pct = (data) => { const all = flat(data); return all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(isActive).length / all.length * 100).toFixed(0) : 0; }; cf.coverage_narrative = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const a = all.filter(isActive).length; const exp = all.filter(isExpired).length; return `${a} 台 active 設備 vs ${exp} 台 license 過期。Coverage 越低，重新規劃 / 採購 license 越急迫。`; }; cf.org_with_expired = (data) => [...new Set(flat(data).filter(isExpired).map(d => d.org_name))].length; cf.org_with_expired_sub = (data) => { const orgs = [...new Set(flat(data).filter(isExpired).map(d => d.org_name))]; return orgs.length === 1 ? `${orgs[0]} only` : `${orgs.length} orgs affected`; }; cf.movable_count = (data) => { return flat(data).filter(d => d._accessible).length; }; cf.movable_sub = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const movable = all.filter(d => d._accessible).length; return `${all.length - movable} blocked by RBAC`; }; cf.blocked_org_count = (data) => (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok' || o.inv_status !== 'ok').length; cf.blocked_org_sub = (data) => { const orgs = (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok' || o.inv_status !== 'ok'); return `${orgs.map(o => o.org_name).join(', ')}`; }; cf.device_by_org_type_matrix = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const types = ['ap', 'switch', 'gateway']; return { rows: orgs.map(o => o.org_name + (o.hv_status !== 'ok' ? ' 🔒' : '')), cols: types.map(t => t.toUpperCase()), cells: orgs.map(o => types.map(t => (o.devices || []).filter(d => d.type === t).length)) }; }; cf.license_by_org_status_matrix = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; return { rows: orgs.map(o => o.org_name + (o.hv_status !== 'ok' ? ' 🔒' : '')), cols: ['Active', 'Expired'], cells: orgs.map(o => { const devs = o.devices || []; return [devs.filter(isActive).length, devs.filter(isExpired).length]; }) }; }; cf.reallocation_candidates = (data) => { return flat(data).map(d => ({...d, recommended_action: isExpired(d) ? (d.type === 'ap' ? '採購新 license 或報廢' : '優先續約（base infra）') : '保留'})); }; cf.recommendation_pills = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExpired); const buckets = {}; exp.forEach(d => { const action = d.type === 'gateway' || d.type === 'switch' ? '優先續約 (base infra)' : '評估報廢或續約 (AP)'; buckets[action] = (buckets[action] || 0) + 1; }); return Object.entries(buckets).map(([label, count]) => ({label: `${label}: ${count} 台`})); }; })();

sections.title: 重新配置候選清單 · Main_Org devices

en.title: Cross-Org Reallocation Planner
en.subtitle: Partner/MSP lens · identify reallocation opportunities (planning-only, no mutations)
en.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const flat = data => (data.topology?.orgs || []).flatMap(o => (o.devices || []).map(d => ({...d, org_name: o.org_name, _accessible: o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok'}))); const isExp = d => d.license_status === 'expired'; const isAct = d => d.license_status === 'active'; cf.realloc_summary = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp); const orgsWithExp = [...new Set(exp.map(d => d.org_name))]; const orgsWithAct = [...new Set(all.filter(isAct).map(d => d.org_name))]; return `${all.length} devices total, ${exp.length} licenses expired (concentrated in ${orgsWithExp.join(', ')}). ${orgsWithAct.length} org(s) still have active licenses as renewal reference. Recommend: (a) verify expired devices are still in use, (b) renew in place, (c) cross-org relocation, or (d) decommission.`; }; cf.fleet_total = (data) => flat(data).length; cf.active_license_count = (data) => flat(data).filter(isAct).length; cf.active_license_pct = (data) => { const all = flat(data); return all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(isAct).length / all.length * 100).toFixed(0) : 0; }; cf.coverage_narrative = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const a = all.filter(isAct).length; const exp = all.filter(isExp).length; return `${a} active devices vs ${exp} expired. Lower coverage means more urgent reallocation / license purchase.`; }; cf.org_with_expired = (data) => [...new Set(flat(data).filter(isExp).map(d => d.org_name))].length; cf.org_with_expired_sub = (data) => { const orgs = [...new Set(flat(data).filter(isExp).map(d => d.org_name))]; return orgs.length === 1 ? `${orgs[0]} only` : `${orgs.length} orgs affected`; }; cf.movable_count = (data) => flat(data).filter(d => d._accessible).length; cf.movable_sub = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const movable = all.filter(d => d._accessible).length; return `${all.length - movable} blocked by RBAC`; }; cf.blocked_org_count = (data) => (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok' || o.inv_status !== 'ok').length; cf.blocked_org_sub = (data) => { const orgs = (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok' || o.inv_status !== 'ok'); return `${orgs.map(o => o.org_name).join(', ')}`; }; cf.device_by_org_type_matrix = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const types = ['ap', 'switch', 'gateway']; return { rows: orgs.map(o => o.org_name + (o.hv_status !== 'ok' ? ' 🔒' : '')), cols: types.map(t => t.toUpperCase()), cells: orgs.map(o => types.map(t => (o.devices || []).filter(d => d.type === t).length)) }; }; cf.license_by_org_status_matrix = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; return { rows: orgs.map(o => o.org_name + (o.hv_status !== 'ok' ? ' 🔒' : '')), cols: ['Active', 'Expired'], cells: orgs.map(o => { const devs = o.devices || []; return [devs.filter(isAct).length, devs.filter(isExp).length]; }) }; }; cf.recommendation_pills = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp); const buckets = {}; exp.forEach(d => { const action = d.type === 'gateway' || d.type === 'switch' ? 'Renew priority (base infra)' : 'Evaluate: decommission or renew (AP)'; buckets[action] = (buckets[action] || 0) + 1; }); return Object.entries(buckets).map(([label, count]) => ({label: `${label}: ${count} devices`})); }; })();

ja.title: クロス Org 設備再配置プランナー
ja.subtitle: Partner / MSP 視点 · クロス Org 再配置機会の特定（プランニングのみ、変更操作なし）
ja.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const flat = data => (data.topology?.orgs || []).flatMap(o => (o.devices || []).map(d => ({...d, org_name: o.org_name, _accessible: o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok'}))); const isExp = d => d.license_status === 'expired'; const isAct = d => d.license_status === 'active'; cf.realloc_summary = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp); const orgsWithExp = [...new Set(exp.map(d => d.org_name))]; const orgsWithAct = [...new Set(all.filter(isAct).map(d => d.org_name))]; return `総デバイス ${all.length} 台、${exp.length} 件のライセンスが期限切れ（${orgsWithExp.join(', ')} に集中）。${orgsWithAct.length} 個の Org が有効ライセンスを保持しており、更新の参考になります。推奨：(a) 期限切れデバイスの使用状況確認、(b) 現状で更新、(c) クロス Org 再配置、(d) 廃棄。`; }; cf.fleet_total = (data) => flat(data).length; cf.active_license_count = (data) => flat(data).filter(isAct).length; cf.active_license_pct = (data) => { const all = flat(data); return all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(isAct).length / all.length * 100).toFixed(0) : 0; }; cf.coverage_narrative = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const a = all.filter(isAct).length; const exp = all.filter(isExp).length; return `有効 ${a} 台 vs 期限切れ ${exp} 台。カバレッジが低いほど、再配置 / ライセンス購入の緊急度が高くなります。`; }; cf.org_with_expired = (data) => [...new Set(flat(data).filter(isExp).map(d => d.org_name))].length; cf.org_with_expired_sub = (data) => { const orgs = [...new Set(flat(data).filter(isExp).map(d => d.org_name))]; return orgs.length === 1 ? `${orgs[0]} のみ` : `${orgs.length} Org が該当`; }; cf.movable_count = (data) => flat(data).filter(d => d._accessible).length; cf.movable_sub = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const movable = all.filter(d => d._accessible).length; return `${all.length - movable} 個が RBAC により制限`; }; cf.blocked_org_count = (data) => (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok' || o.inv_status !== 'ok').length; cf.blocked_org_sub = (data) => { const orgs = (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok' || o.inv_status !== 'ok'); return `${orgs.map(o => o.org_name).join(', ')}`; }; cf.device_by_org_type_matrix = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const types = ['ap', 'switch', 'gateway']; return { rows: orgs.map(o => o.org_name + (o.hv_status !== 'ok' ? ' 🔒' : '')), cols: types.map(t => t.toUpperCase()), cells: orgs.map(o => types.map(t => (o.devices || []).filter(d => d.type === t).length)) }; }; cf.license_by_org_status_matrix = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; return { rows: orgs.map(o => o.org_name + (o.hv_status !== 'ok' ? ' 🔒' : '')), cols: ['有効', '期限切れ'], cells: orgs.map(o => { const devs = o.devices || []; return [devs.filter(isAct).length, devs.filter(isExp).length]; }) }; }; cf.recommendation_pills = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp); const buckets = {}; exp.forEach(d => { const action = d.type === 'gateway' || d.type === 'switch' ? '優先更新（基幹インフラ）' : '要評価：廃棄または更新 (AP)'; buckets[action] = (buckets[action] || 0) + 1; }); return Object.entries(buckets).map(([label, count]) => ({label: `${label}: ${count} 台`})); }; })();
